name: Forgotten War
short_description: A "historical" strategy on the theme of wars of different times and peoples, with fun physics and destructibility. Command the blue or red army, fight with the computer, unlock a variety of weapons, or have fun in the sandbox! If you like shooters, you will like the game mode on behalf of units.
detailed_description:
A strategy on the theme of wars of different times and peoples. The game is based on the physical interaction of objects with each other. Play as the blue or red army, unlock a variety of weapons and units. Artificial intelligence places enemy troops randomly, so each battle will be unique. It is possible to give units simple commands, for example: hold a position, attack a certain enemy or go to a given point. There is a game mode on behalf of any unit. There is also a sandbox, with the ability to edit borders, in which you can create your own battle. Destructibility is present, in its nascent form, in the future, this mechanics will develop.

Functions:

  • The battle generator.

  • Sandbox.

  • The game mode is on behalf of the unit.

  • Destructibility.

  • Weapons editor.

  • The tree of leveling weapons and units.

  • Command of units.
